title: Add support for -z and -Z mount flags to processOptions
body: Looks like we missed these when we added the --mount flag.

/NACK
This is a noop.  
You are checking if an option is "Z" or "z" and then adding an options "Z" or "z".  
Otherwise you add the option.
If you remove the check you add the option that is a "Z" or a "z"
Damn, you're right. I shouldn't write PRs before coffee. Closing...
